sourceStatus.publicationPolicy: No long SEC source text is embedded; evidence uses short digests and source URL anchors.

summaryKo.oneLine: Trane Technologies는 2025년 4분기 매출 51억 달러와 조정 EPS 2.86달러를 기록하며 견조한 성장세를 보였습니다.

keyPoints.text: 4분기 매출은 전년 동기 대비 6% 증가한 51억 달러를 기록했으며, 조정 EPS는 10% 상승한 2.86달러를 달성했습니다.
기록적인 78억 달러 규모의 수주 잔고를 확보하여 2026년 이후의 시장 성장에 대한 높은 가시성을 확보했습니다.

businessChanges.text: 미주 지역의 4분기 응용 제품(applied) 수주액이 120% 이상 급증하며 강력한 고객 수요를 입증했습니다.

financialHighlights.text: 4분기 GAAP 기준 EPS는 2.74달러, 조정 EPS는 2.86달러를 기록했습니다.
2025년 연간 조정 EPS는 전년 대비 16% 증가한 13.06달러를 기록했습니다.
연간 잉여현금흐름 전환율은 98%로 매우 견조한 수준을 유지했습니다.

watchItems.text: 기록적인 수주 잔고가 실제 매출로 전환되는 속도와 미주 지역 상업용 HVAC의 높은 수요 모멘텀 지속 여부를 확인해야 합니다.

evidence.sourceTextDigest: EX-99.1 2 exhibit991-q42025earningsr.htm EX-99.1 Document Trane Technologies Reports Strong Fourth-Quarter and Full-Year 2025 Results; Robust Bookings and Backlog Provide Strong Visibility Entering 2026 Highlights (fourth-quarter 2025 versus fourth-quarter 2024, unless otherwise noted): l Organic bookings up 22 percent, led by Americas Commercial HVAC, up more than 35 percent l Record backlog of $7.8 billion, up 15 percent versus year-end 2024; Americas Commercial HVAC up 25 percent l Reported revenues of $5.1 billion, up 6 percent; organic revenues* up 4 percent l GAAP continuing EPS of $2.74; adjusted continuing EPS* of $2.86, up 10 percent Highlights (full-year 2025 versus full-year 2024, unl  Normalized numeric aliases: $7.8 billion = 78억 달러; $5.1 billion = 51억 달러; $21.3 billion = 213억 달러; $7.8 = 7.8달러; $5.1 = 5.1달러; $2.74 = 2.74달러; $2.86 = 2.86달러; $21.3 = 21.3달러; 35 percent = 35%; 10 percent = 10%; 25 percent = 25%; 6 percent = 6%; 4 percent = 4%; 11 percent = 11%; 7 percent = 7%.

ating margin up 100 bps; adjusted operating margin* up 90 bps l Adjusted EBITDA margin* of 20.1 percent, up 70 bps l GAAP continuing EPS of $13.14; adjusted continuing EPS of $13.06, up 16 percent l Strong free cash flow conversion* of 98 percent * This news release contains non-GAAP financial measures. Definitions of the non-GAAP financial measures can be found in the footnotes of this news release. See attached tables for additional details and reconciliations. SWORDS, Ireland, January 29, 2026 - Trane Technologies plc (NYSE:TT), a global climate innovator, today reported diluted earnings per share (EPS) from continuing operations of $2.74 for the fourth quarter of 2025. Adjusted continuing EPS was $2.86, up 10 percent. our commercial HVAC businesses, led by the Americas, where fourth quarter applied bookings were up more than 120%. We ended the year with record enterprise backlog of $7.8 billion, providing strong visibility to future market outgrowth. “Since launching Trane Technologies in 2020, we’ve built a powerful long-term track record – including compound annual revenue growth of 11%, EBITDA margin expansion of 470 basis points, compound annual adjusted earnings per share growth of 24%, and free cash flow conversion of 106%.
